description: REQ-003 and REQ-017 explicitly require that EmptyNoteDiscarded is NOT returned as a SaveError. REQ-003 states: 'The return from prepareSaveRequest is { kind: "empty-discarded", event: EmptyNoteDiscarded } -- in the Ok channel, not the Err channel.' REQ-017 states: 'EmptyNoteDiscarded NEVER appears in the Err channel.' However, pipeline.ts lines 90-98 convert the Ok(empty-discarded) result from prepareSaveRequest into Err({ kind: 'validation', reason: { kind: 'empty-body-on-idle' } }). The pipeline comment at line 5 openly acknowledges this deviation: 'REQ-003: EmptyNoteDiscarded -> returned as SaveError (empty-body-on-idle)'. The pipeline.test.ts lines 366-378 assert this incorrect behavior, expecting ok:false. The spec says the implementation should return an appropriate Ok value for EmptyNoteDiscarded, surfacing it only via event emission.
